outputs.change: Protocol-shaped messages are accepted only from the known, non-null Nexus iframe contentWindow. Impersonation from any other source creates a local UNTRUSTED_SOURCE rejection receipt and is never answered with postMessage. The listener effect depends on the stable getTargetWindow callback instead of the fresh options object.

Committed Playwright smoke harness that launches dev or preview mode and checks the package iframe path, trusted diagnostic receipts, exact single-ping counting, local untrusted rejection, no receipt reply to the untrusted sender, and browser error streams.
Regenerated single-file artifact from the verified Phase 1 source.
Regenerated single-file artifact from the verified Phase 1 source.

claims: The /nexus-router route mounts NexusRouterStudio and its iframe src is ./nexus/os/Nexus_OS.html; the source exists under public/nexus/os and the production build copies it to dist/nexus/os.
A diagnostic.ping originating in the tracked iframe is accepted and receives a NEXUS_HOST_BRIDGE_RECEIPT; a manual trusted ping increments the accepted counter exactly once.
A protocol-shaped diagnostic.ping from the parent window is not accepted, creates one local receipt with error UNTRUSTED_SOURCE, and receives no postMessage response.
The useEffect dependency is stable and the dev and preview smoke runs completed with no React maximum-depth error, console error, or uncaught page error.
The committed smoke harness passed against both the Vite development server and the production dist served by Vite preview.
non_claims: This receipt has status_authority NONE and makes no claim of production readiness, security audit, or real-world value.
Phase 2, Agent import/scrub, ODS UI, creature work, Nostr publishing, and sim-frame work were not started.
TECH_SPEC §8.2 A1-A3 still require SEAT-GROK-DRIVE/operator manual acceptance; browser automation is runtime evidence, not operator acceptance.
npm audit reported 5 dependency findings (1 low, 3 moderate, 1 high); dependency remediation was outside this Phase 1 closeout.
The receipt is committed after the immutable verified runtime commit named by verified_at_commit; the receipt-only commit does not alter the verified product files.

checks.result: Added and audited 166 packages; npm audit reported 5 vulnerabilities (1 low, 3 moderate, 1 high).
PASS; Vite transformed 295 modules, produced dist, and pack.js emitted verse-studio.html and noted-v0.01.html.
PASS in dev mode: package path, trusted boot/manual ping, exact single increment, local untrusted rejection, no untrusted reply, and zero console/page errors.
PASS against production dist via Vite preview with the same assertions and zero console/page errors.

limitations: The installed Playwright package expected a Chromium revision absent from this machine; the smoke harness reproducibly discovered and used the existing local chromium-1181 cache. PLAYWRIGHT_CHROMIUM_EXECUTABLE_PATH can explicitly select another executable.
The first npm ci attempt inside the managed sandbox failed with EPERM when executing esbuild; the identical required command passed outside that execution sandbox after approval.
The first registry invocation used the correct command from the wrong working directory and failed to locate the script; it was immediately rerun from the Lab root and passed.
next: NEXT: SEAT-GROK-DRIVE for TECH_SPEC §8.2 A1-A3 acceptance. Do not begin Phase 2.
